title: exacum pusillum
intro: Exacum pusillum, also known as Indian snail flower or small exacum, is a species of flowering plant in the family Gentianaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Exacum pusillum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from digestive problems. In herbal preparations, Exacum pusillum is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
